Your favourite music
from any platform

Made by MyLuxy  —  fh6-cloudbeats-custom-radio

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about Horizon CloudBeats.

What is Horizon CloudBeats?
Horizon CloudBeats is a mod for Forza Horizon 6 that replaces the in-game radio with your own music. You can stream from local files, YouTube Music, or a Jellyfin server — all controlled from this web dashboard running locally on your PC.
How do I install it?
Extract the mod ZIP into your Forza Horizon 6 install folder — the same folder that contains forzahorizon6.exe. Then launch the game, go to Audio Settings, set Radio DJ = Off and Streamer Mode = On. Cycle through the radio stations until you land on Horizon CloudBeats.
What music sources are supported?
Four sources are available:

Spotify — Paste any public playlist, album, or track link. No Premium and no login required — tracks are matched and streamed via YouTube.

YouTube Music — Paste any video or playlist URL directly from the dashboard.

Jellyfin — Stream playlists from your own Jellyfin media server.

Local Files — Point it at any folder. MP3, FLAC, WAV and OGG work out of the box. M4A, AAC, OPUS, WMA and others require ffmpeg (see Options).
Setup for Spotify and YouTube
Spotify and YouTube playback need three external tools (yt-dlp, ffmpeg, deno). The desktop app installs them automatically on launch — or run these manually in a terminal:

winget install yt-dlp.yt-dlp
winget install Gyan.FFmpeg
winget install DenoLand.Deno
For private or age-restricted content, export a cookies.txt from your browser using an extension like Get cookies.txt LOCALLY, then set the path in Options.
The music isn't playing, what do I do?
Check these things in order:

1. Streamer Mode must be On in Audio Settings.
2. Make sure you're tuned to the Horizon CloudBeats station in-game.
3. In the dashboard, select a source and press Play.
4. If using local files, set your music directory in Options.
5. If the bridge status shows offline, check that version.dll was installed correctly and your antivirus hasn't quarantined it.
Can I access the dashboard from another device?
Yes. From any device on the same network, open http://[your-PC-IP]:8420 in a browser. Run ipconfig in Command Prompt to find your PC's local IP address.
How do I skip tracks without using the dashboard?
Enable Quick Station Skip in Options. Then, while in-game, briefly tune the radio knob away from Horizon CloudBeats and immediately back within 1 second — this skips to the next track.
Does the music respect in-game volume?
Yes. Audio is routed through FH6's radio bus, so it fades during menus, cutscenes, and respects the game's volume settings exactly like any other radio station.
Credits
Built on FH6 Universal Radio by g0ldyy — released under GPLv3.

Support the upstream author: GitHub Sponsors · Ko-fi

Settings

Changes are saved to config.toml and take effect immediately.
